en: Wisdom has built her house;she has hewn her seven pillars.
zh: 智慧建造自己的房屋， 鑿成七根柱子。

en: She has slaughtered her beasts; she has mixed her wine; she has also set her table.
zh: 它宰殺牲口，調配美酒， 擺設筵席。

en: She has sent out her young women to call from the highest places in the town,
zh: 它差派幾個使女出去， 自己又在城裡的高處呼喊：

en: "Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!" To him who lacks sense she says,
zh: “誰是愚蒙人， 可以到這裡來！” 又對無知的人說：

en: "Come, eat of my bread and drink of the wine I have mixed.
zh: “你們都來，吃我的餅， 喝我調配的酒。

en: Leave your simple ways, and live, and walk in the way of insight."
zh: 愚蒙人哪！你們要丟棄愚蒙，就可以存活， 並且要走在智慧的道路上。”

en: Whoever corrects a scoffer gets himself abuse, and he who reproves a wicked man incurs injury.
zh: 糾正好譏笑人的，必自招恥辱； 責備惡人的，必遭受羞辱。

en: Do not reprove a scoffer, or he will hate you; reprove a wise man, and he will love you.
zh: 你不要責備好譏笑人的， 免得他恨你； 要責備智慧人，他必愛你。

en: Give instruction to a wise man, and he will be still wiser; teach a righteous man, and he will increase in learning.
zh: 教導智慧人，他就越有智慧； 指教義人，他就增加學問。

en: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the Holy One is insight.
zh: 敬畏耶和華是智慧的開端， 認識至聖者就是聰明。

en: For by me your days will be multiplied, and years will be added to your life.
zh: 因為藉著我，你的日子就必增多， 你一生的年歲也必加添。

en: If you are wise, you are wise for yourself; if you scoff, you alone will bear it.
zh: 如果你有智慧，你的智慧必使你得益； 如果你譏笑人，你就必獨自擔當一切後果。

en: The woman Folly is loud; she is seductive and knows nothing.
zh: 愚昧的婦人喧嘩不停， 她是愚蒙，一無所知。

en: She sits at the door of her house; she takes a seat on the highest places of the town,
zh: 她坐在自己的家門口， 坐在城中高處的座位上，

en: calling to those who pass by, who are going straight on their way,
zh: 向過路的人呼叫， 就是向往前直行的人呼叫：

en: "Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!" And to him who lacks sense she says,
zh: “誰是愚蒙人，可以到這裡來！” 又對無知的人說：

en: "Stolen water is sweet, and bread eaten in secret is pleasant."
zh: “偷來的水是甜的， 在暗中吃的餅是美味的。”

en: But he does not know that the dead are there, that her guests are in the depths of Sheol.
zh: 人卻不知道她那裡有陰魂， 她的客人是在陰間的深處。
